name: Book of the Dead
description: Summons Necronomicon Warriors and Archers with strong attacks, mana-burn effects, and dispel abilities.

effects.primary: Summons 2 Necronomicon Warriors and 2 Necronomicon Archers for 65 seconds. Each attack deals damage equal to 0.75 times the base attack damage plus 50% of the mana burnt from enemies, with a cooldown of 80 seconds.

notes: Demonic Warrior burns 50 mana per hit and deals 50% of that as additional damage.
Demonic Archer applies a basic dispel on target enemy and slows their movement speed by 100%, which decays to 20% over 4 seconds, with a cooldown of 15 seconds.
